candidate.name: Luke Bair
candidate.notes: Mythril.Multi-user story editing with AI helper. beautiful hero. responsive problems. bypass security by going to urls directly. AI not answering questions

candidate.name: Kou Barlow
candidate.notes: Tomodachi. Journal sharing. Bad form HCI. Nice and clean. I'm not sure what the websocket is doing. It doesn't seem to be updating the page with new journal entries.

candidate.name: Kaden Bradshaw
candidate.notes: PantryPal. Nice friend request with websocket. create recipe and shopping list with AI. share recipes. This is pretty cool

candidate.name: Joshua Brown
candidate.notes: Fjord. playing card manager. Actually pretty nice ui. websocket for trading. Not sure how to actually create a deck though.

candidate.name: Adam Clark
candidate.notes: Drawdle. Draw what the prompt says. Doesn't seem to work other than drawing.

candidate.name: Rachel Coffey
candidate.notes: StoryPolls. create a poll and then vote. I don't see what the websocket is doing.

candidate.name: Sean Cowley
candidate.notes: Cooked Book. Create recipes. Looks half done. Can't upload image. Don't know what is happening with websocket.

candidate.name: Howard Crawford
candidate.notes: Tag. Multiplayer tag. This is really well done. Always sending websocket message though even when not moving.

candidate.name: Claire Daley
candidate.notes: Tap a lot. no error on duplicate user. tap a button for points. Kinda nice. Don't know what websocket is doing.

candidate.name: James Davies

candidate.name: Benjamin DeGraff
candidate.notes: Vibe Check. Shared jukebox. chat. pulls songs from youtube. websocket seems to be working. I really like this.

candidate.name: Brayden Dickerson
candidate.notes: Weighted Dice. I think you create your own die and see if you can roll a streak. Doesn't seem to be working though.

candidate.name: Rebekah Evans

candidate.name: Jeffrey Grover
